title: pelargonium × flexuosum
intro: Pelargonium × flexuosum, also known as the 'Vicks Plant' or 'Red Tip Rose Geranium', is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × flexuosum include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help alleviate stress and anxiety. The plant's leaves and flowers are commonly used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
